035.notes: Location entry preserves the target hierarchy: lime app bar, full-width search, and stacked map/draw/nearby actions. Copy and pictograms are product-localized rather than copied brand assets.

037.notes: The draw instruction is functional, but the actual map extent and drawing controls do not yet match the target frame closely enough. This state is retained as an explicit non-blocking visual delta.

042.notes: The real Google Maps polygon drawing state is visible and unmasked, but the deterministic keyboard polygon differs from the target gesture geometry.

043.notes: The completed polygon and actions are functional and visible, but the polygon shape and action treatment remain a target delta.

045.notes: The selected-zone results list is structurally comparable, but card density and media height exceed the target thresholds.

057.notes: The results list remains a documented density delta; target and actual are not declared equivalent.

060.notes: PASS for the map acceptance surface: normalized header, context bar, map, layer/location/draw controls and switcher meet the 4/6 px geometry gate. Google raster styling and required Advanced price markers/clusters intentionally replace the target's legacy pins; neither is masked.

063.notes: PASS for the zoomed map surface: programmatic cluster zoom preserves the target frame and does not expose Search this area. Required Advanced price markers are an intentional implementation substitution.

066.notes: PASS for selected-listing geometry: sheet x/y/width/height, visible-map area, header/context frame and non-overlap with the Lista/Mapa switcher meet the target gate. Listing media and localized copy are source-content differences.

090.notes: PASS for the saved selected-listing state: the sheet remains fixed to the same target geometry and the favorite state is visibly persistent without moving the map viewport.
